pi_items.source: Direct HTTP verification: curl -I https://crawler-test.com/links/broken_links returns 'HTTP/2 404'. Web search confirmed actual working pages are /links/broken_links_internal and /links/broken_links_external (both return HTTP 200).

pi_items.verified_value: 404 (correct for broken links found on the site)
pi_items.source: Manual inspection of https://crawler-test.com/links/broken_links_internal content shows it contains links to /links/not_found/foo* paths which return HTTP 404. Verified with curl -I https://crawler-test.com/links/not_found/foo1 returns 'HTTP/2 404'.

privileged_info_summary: The task targets a public test website at crawler-test.com/links/broken_links. However, the specified target URL returns HTTP 404 and is non-functional. The actual working broken link test pages on the site are https://crawler-test.com/links/broken_links_internal and https://crawler-test.com/links/broken_links_external (both HTTP 200), which contain links that return 404 status codes as expected for broken link detection testing. The data is real and sourced from the public crawler-test.com domain.
